@@ -1,697 +1,719 @@
-package main%0A%0Aimport %22fmt%22%0A%0A// x: n%C3%BAmero que est%C3%A1 sendo testado%0A// div: divisor que est%C3%A1 sendo testado%0Afunc eh_primo(x int, div int) bool %7B%0A%09// Casos base para n%C3%BAmeros menores ou iguais a 1 (n%C3%A3o s%C3%A3o primos)%0A%09if x %3C= 1 %7B%0A%09%09return false%0A%09%7D%0A%09%0A%09// Ponto de parada de sucesso: se testamos todos os divisores at%C3%A9 x e %0A%09// nenhum deu resto 0, ent%C3%A3o o n%C3%BAmero %C3%A9 primo.%0A%09if div == x %7B%0A%09%09return true%0A%09%7D%0A%09%0A%09// Ponto de parada de falha: se encontrar um divisor, n%C3%A3o %C3%A9 primo.%0A%09if x%25div == 0 %7B%0A%09%09return false%0A%09%7D%0A%09%0A%09// Chamada recursiva testando o pr%C3%B3ximo divisor%0A%09return eh_primo(x, div+1)%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09var x int%0A%09fmt.Scan(&x)%0A%09if eh_primo(x, 2) %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22true%22)%0A%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22false%22)%0A%09%7D%0A%7D
+# Retorna se %C3%A9 ou n%C3%A3o %C3%A9%0A%0ASeja um n%C3%BAmero inteiro, retorne se ele %C3%A9 primo ou n%C3%A3o.%0A%0A## Draft%0A%0A%3C!-- links .cache/drafts --%3E%0A- cpp%0A  - %5Bmain.cpp%5D(../../.tko/cache/6421490caf670842e74ba5681e807eeaa53f9028/base/eh_primo/.cache/drafts/cpp/main.cpp)%0A- go%0A  - %5Bmain.go%5D(../../.tko/cache/6421490caf670842e74ba5681e807eeaa53f9028/base/eh_primo/.cache/drafts/go/main.go)%0A%3C!-- links --%3E%0A%0A## Testes%0A%0A%60%60%60bash%0A%0A%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%0A1%0A========%0Afalse%0A%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%0A%0A%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%0A2%0A========%0Atrue%0A%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%0A%0A%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%0A3%0A========%0Atrue%0A%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%0A%0A%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%0A4%0A========%0Afalse%0A%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%0A%0A%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%0A5%0A========%0Atrue%0A%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%0A%0A%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%0A6%0A========%0Afalse%0A%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%0A%0A%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%0A7%0A========%0Atrue%0A%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%0A%0A%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%0A18%0A========%0Afalse%0A%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%0A%0A%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%3E%0A19%0A========%0Atrue%0A%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%3C%0A%0A%60%60%60%0A
